Event: Magic Training - Bombardier
Event Date: 01/08/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A159
Eagle Talisman

Triggers: Once in a while

Can't Have Too Much Health
The artifact owner steals 40% of max health from a random enemy for 5 sec. During this time, the target and all enemies in a small radius around it take magic damage equal to 15% of the artifact owner's max health every second. This damage ignores shields and effects that reduce the target's incoming damage.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
